title: bidens graveolens
intro: Bidens graveolens, also known as Bur Marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the aster family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Bidens graveolens is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
